description: Curated skill bundles for the OpenClaw Frontier Stack. Each bundle names a coherent slice of the public skill catalog so plugin hosts and operators can install a focused subset rather than the full surface. Bundles are metadata-only; the skills themselves are already in-repo under skills/.

marketing-core.description: Modern Skills marketing essentials for operators and agencies. Covers conversion, retention, copy, SEO, subscription growth, and the day-to-day ecomm decisions that drive revenue.

marketing-extended.description: Marketing surface beyond the core: ads, programmatic SEO, pricing, bundles, referrals, partner programs, and the AI-creative skills for image and video generation.

engineering-core.description: Engineering workflow essentials complementary to obra/superpowers. Incident lifecycle, ADRs, API and schema design, refactoring safety, and the monitoring and alerting basics.

engineering-reliability.description: Reliability and operations workflow: on-call, deploys, capacity, disaster recovery, load testing, backups, and the verification rituals that keep production honest.

engineering-security.description: Security workflow: review patterns, threat modeling, secrets handling, dependency hygiene, and the audit rituals that gate sensitive code paths.

operator-core.description: Operators running the OpenClaw release-gate and durable task ledger. Three host-neutral procedural skills that ship the operator-safe release pipeline.

agent-substrate.description: Building skills on top of OpenClaw's agent runtime (signed-bus, ticketing, goal-loop). Covers the cross-cutting concerns every agent integration must address.
